item.title: 📰 News Weekly: 2023
item.author: Author
item.description: Week (33): 2023-08-14 - 2023-08-20 Better Java Compiler Error Messages Week (30): 2023-07-24 - 2023-07-30 Soft delete and JPA version property - Vlad Mihalcea Week (29): 2023-07-17 - 2023-07-23 Breaking java.lang.String – Wouter Coekaerts The Tragic Death of Inheritance Week (26): 2023-06-26 - 2023-07-02 Improving JSON parsing performance in opensearch-java · OpenSearch Gatherers An Interesting Concurrency Bug | mizoblog Week (25): 2023-06-19 - 2023-06-25 GraalVM EE is Dead, Long Live Oracle GraalVM - JVM Weekly vol.

item.title: 📰 News Weekly: 2022
item.author: Author
item.description: Week (51): 2022-12-19 - 2022-12-25 Highlights from Git 2.39 | The GitHub Blog 8 Best Logging Practices to Keep Sensitive Data Out Docker Best Practices - DZone Architecture and Code Design, Pt. 1 - DZone Week (49): 2022-12-05 - 2022-12-11 RESTful web API Design best practices | Google Cloud Blog The complete guide to System Design in 2022 Week (48): 2022-11-28 - 2022-12-04 JDK 20: The new features in Java 20 | InfoWorld DevOps for Java Developers EP34: Session, cookie, JWT, token, SSO, and OAuth Netflix Backend System Designing Flow EP33: Twitter Architecture 2022 vs 2012 - by Alex Xu Architecting an API Backend | Nordic APIs | Week (47): 2022-11-21 - 2022-11-27 Retrofitting null-safety onto Java at Meta The best way to do the Spring 6 migration - Vlad Mihalcea Why I Don’t do TDD - DEV Community Week (46): 2022-11-14 - 2022-11-20 Understanding Java’s Project Loom Setting up Junit 5 Parallel Test Execution With Maven Automated Code Migrations With Spring Boot Migrator | Fabian Krueger (EN) - YouTube Testcontainers: Testing with real dependencies - AtomicJar Week (45): 2022-11-07 - 2022-11-13 Message Queue and NoSQL with 10x Performance Boost Week (44): 2022-10-31 - 2022-11-06 EP30: Why is PostgreSQL the most loved database Netflix System Design - Backend Architecture Spring Boot 3.
